title: Tropical Stamping
excerpt: Greetings from Florida! On JC's last trip to NY, he picked up these cool Yellow Owl Workshop stamps for me. He said he thought they would be perfect for using on Jack's thank you cards if I felt so inclined…
body:
Greetings from Florida! On JC's last trip to NY, he picked up these cool Yellow Owl Workshop stamps for me. He said he thought they would be perfect for using on Jack's thank you cards if I felt so inclined to making them by hand. Well, I thought I would, but ended up just using them along with my favorite inks and supplies to make some quick crafts.

I tried a white ink pad for the first time in a while and was extremely happy with the results. It's juicy and has the cutest name - Cold Hands Warm Heart. Most importantly, it stamps really well! Ironically, JC is in New York once again while Jack and I are taking advantage of a little visit with friends in sunny Florida. We're having plenty of pineapple and hoping to flag down a flamingo.

Supplies: Ranger Inks and White ink pad from Simon Says Stamp | Many Thanks stamp by Ann-Marie Loves | Cutting mat by American Crafts
